name: King-Dispenser-RX-V2.docx
content:
What is the King Dispenser RX and what can it count?

The King Dispenser RX (DC 6080001E) is a GMP-compliant, semi-automatic dual station tablet and capsule counting and filling machine. It is C.E. King’s most popular bench-top counter, designed for pharmacies, laboratories, small-scale production, clinical trials, and R&D environments. The machine handles a diverse array of oral doses and tablet-based products and efficiently fills both glass and plastic containers, as well as pouches.

Details

  • Counts coated or uncoated tablets, hard and soft gelatin capsules, caplets, softgels, and dragees
  • Dual station operation: divider flap mechanism directs counted products into one of two dispensing funnels for continuous filling
  • Transparent conical product hopper with 2.5 litre capacity, removable and height-adjustable
  • Vibratory bowl feeder ring transports products from hopper with consistent, controlled flow
  • Electronic sensing head provides accurate piece counting with high precision
  • Standard tablet handling range: 7mm to 15mm diameter (alternative bowl feeder tooling available for sizes outside this range)
  • Capsule handling range: up to size 0E, accommodating a wide range of capsule sizes and shapes
  • Feed rates (subject to product properties): 5mm tablets up to 1,000/min; 8mm tablets up to 700/min; 11mm tablets/caplets up to 500/min; size 0 capsules up to 300/min; 15mm tablets/caplets up to 300/min
  • Modern stainless steel cabinet design with integral 3.5” touchscreen interface
  • Quick release tablet and capsule guide with no-tool flap housing for fast changeovers
  • Adjustable container platform to accommodate different bottle and pouch sizes
  • Feeder ring assemblies available with adjustable outlet, capsule clip, vacuum take-off holes, and options for large tablets (15mm–24mm) or potent medicines (enclosed path with cover)
  • Dispensing funnel assemblies available in round outlet (15mm, 20mm, 27mm, 30mm), square outlet (38mm), and conical outlet (20mm, 25mm) — manufactured from FDA-approved food-grade plastic with quick-release, tool-free design
  • Optional vacuum take-off assembly (DC 6080006A) for tablet dust removal during counting
  • Optional industrial vacuum cleaner with HEPA filtration for cleanroom applications
  • Optional adjustable platform assembly (large) for stand-up pouches and doypacks up to 170mm x 260mm
  • Complete set of product contact parts available (DC 6080009A) including hopper, hopper outlet sleeve, feeder ring, tablet guide assembly, flap housing, window, flap, and funnel — all FDA-compliant materials
  • Optional IQ/OQ validation support documentation for pharmaceutical environments
  • Optional two-year spare parts package including HMI panel, motor, magnetic circuit breaker, vibrator controller, power supply, and O-rings
  • Build standards: Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC, EMC Directive 2004/108/EC, FDA-compliant contact materials
  • Power requirement: 220/240V 50Hz 1 phase or 110V 60Hz 1 phase 13A — no pneumatic requirement
  • Net weight: 25kg
  • CE certified, designed in compliance with UKCA and CE standards
  • Manufactured within ISO 9001:2015 quality systems at C.E. King’s UK facility
  • Standard machine warranty: 1 year from delivery
  • Instruction manual (English) included with mechanical and electrical drawings, parts lists, and maintenance details
  • Customs tariff classification: 8422.30 (Machinery)
  • Country of origin: United Kingdom
  • Demonstration videos available at youtube.com/@cekinglimited
  • Spare parts available at king.parts

Link:

https://www.ceking.com/products/king-dispenser-rx
